title: Vision Guide System Configuration for CV2
description:
Vision Guide System Configuration for CV2

System Configuration for CV2

To use the CV2, connect it with the Robot Controller using an Ethernet cable.

Do not use the CV2 continuously while the keyboard and the mouse are connected.

The illustration below shows the system configuration using the compact vision CV2.

Note:  As with our robot system, Compact Vision CV2 is provided on the assumption that customers use it in a closed local area network. Be sure to use an IP address in the following private IP address ranges unless a public (global) IP address is required.

Private IP address ranges

10.0.0.1 ~ 10.255.255.254

172.16.0.1 ~ 172.31.255.254

192.168.0.1 ~ 192.168.255.254

Note: To use the CV2, use the EPSON RC+ 7.0 Ver. 7.1.1 or later.

Basic connection configuration (one CV2)

Basic connection configuration (two CV2)
